content: agent1: working on fixing NDCG IDCG calculation in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py. Will touch this file.

agent1: my IDCG fix is minimal - in NDCG.compute I removed the 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' line and changed idcg to iterate 'for i in range(1, len(expected_ids) + 1)' instead of 'ideal_length + 1'. Everything else (dcg calc, expected_set, discounted_gain calls) is untouched. Should merge cleanly with your relevance_scores addition - just rebase your idcg loop bound off len(expected_ids) (or the relevance_scores dict length) rather than the old min() expression. Landing my change now.
